subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! Bear thou witness unto that which God Himself hath testified in the Most Great Prison - that there is none other God but Me, the True One, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی ان اشهدی بما شهد الله فی السجن الاعظم انه لا اله الا انا الحق علام
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @spiritual transformation
